assertionResults.title: Sidebar renders with channels and video list
assertionResults.reason: Workspace sidebar rendered channel controls and a populated video list; selecting channel entries kept the video list visible and interactive.

assertionResults.title: Content mode tabs switch correctly
assertionResults.reason: With a selected video, Info/Summary/Highlights/Transcript tabs all switched successfully and rendered corresponding content states.

assertionResults.title: Search bar opens and returns results
assertionResults.reason: Search accepted query, rendered results panel, and selecting a result navigated to the matching video context in workspace.

assertionResults.title: No visible loading jank from lazy-loaded components
assertionResults.reason: After hard refresh, workspace shell remained visible through initial and stable captures; performance entries reported first-contentful-paint at ~1028ms and CLS=0.

assertionResults.title: Modals and error toast still function
assertionResults.reason: Modal surfaced correctly during privileged channel-delete attempt (Sign in / Not now). Error toast rendered when mutation was attempted offline and was dismissible.

frictions.description: Search results did not appear on typing alone; submitting the query was required to open the results panel.
frictions.resolution: Used Submit search action after entering query.

frictions.description: Delete-channel action for non-operator surfaced sign-in modal instead of destructive confirmation.
frictions.resolution: Used this modal as modal evidence, then triggered offline mutation to validate error toast behavior.
